summary: Frontend-only validation of major restructuring: real React Router pages instead of anchor scroll, 8 services (including new Digital Ecosystems #01 + Custom AI #05), and reduced typography sizing. All critical flows pass: home hero (new headline 'We build whole digital ecosystems.'), navbar links navigate to /work /services /process /contact (URLs change, no anchor scroll), each page renders its own header + correct data-testids, 6 project cards on /work, 8 service cards on /services with correct slugs, service detail pages render for new slugs (digital-ecosystems, custom-ai) and existing ones, invalid slug redirects to /services, /work/halden back-to-work goes to /work, footer uses react-router Links, sticky-whatsapp present, mobile menu (375px) opens and navigates via nav-mobile-* testids. No console/page errors. Hero H1 computes to 92px at 1920px viewport which matches clamp(2.25rem, 6.5vw, 5.75rem) cap.

issues:
H1 textContent reads 'Four phases.Zero theatrics.' (concatenated without a space when read as plain text). Visually fine if styled with
or block layout, but spec wording said '4 phases. Zero theatrics.' — minor cosmetic / copywriting discrepancy; verify the period+next sentence has visual gap

action_items: No action required for navigation, routing, service slugs, or sizing — all working as specified.

Optional: Confirm desired wording on /process h1 ('Four phases. Zero theatrics.' vs '4 phases. Zero theatrics.') — both render visually, but plain-text reads as 'Four phases.Zero theatrics.' without spacing.
critical_code_review_comments: Mobile menu uses a separate set of test IDs (nav-mobile-work, nav-mobile-services, nav-mobile-process, nav-mobile-contact) distinct from desktop nav-link-* IDs. This is intentional and correct (avoids duplicate testids), but worth documenting so future tests don't assume nav-link-* works on mobile.

Hero H1 'We build whole digital ecosystems.' renders 'DIGITAL' lowercase in DOM. Visual styling (text-transform / underline accent) may produce the uppercase 'DIGITAL' look from the spec — verify if uppercase styling is intended or text content should literally be 'DIGITAL'.

Routing/SPA looks clean — BrowserRouter, ScrollToTopOnRouteChange handles pathname + hash, invalid service slug correctly redirects, hideHeader prop pattern reuses Services/Portfolio/Process components cleanly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All routing, service slugs, service-detail pages, project cards, footer links, sticky whatsapp, mobile menu and typography sizing verified working on https://portfolio-showcase-1710.preview.emergentagent.com. Note that mobile nav links use nav-mobile-* data-testids (not nav-link-*). Hero H1 font-size = 92px @ 1920px viewport (= clamp max 5.75rem).
